title: What i think about Barrak Obama and disclosure

transcript.text: Hello, this video is what I think about Barack Obama. I think Barack Obama is a good sign that we are about to enter into an age of enlightenment.

And I don't really follow politics that much, but one thing I do know is that that whole health care thing is definitely what we need.

Because we're not going to be, people aren't going to be convoluted into all of these crazy debts that they can't repay, kind of like the whole credit card thing.

The best way to do that is by having this health care bill.

Just ask them, because we don't have that.

For which I had to pay like $500, actually, because I didn't have insurance, I had some special deal.
But anyways, that's still too much, you know.
So, that was a cool thing.
